input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/probe_vocab.py
import urllib.request
import json
urllib.request.urlretrieve("https://openaipublic.blob.core.windows.net/gpt-2/models/124M/vocab.json", "vocab.json")
with open("vocab.json") as f:
    v = json.load(f)

print(v['Ġt'])
print(v['Ġa'])
print(v['he'])
print(v['in'])
print(v['re'])
EOF
python3 /app/probe_vocab.py

import json
with open("vocab.json") as f:
    v = json.load(f)
base_tokens = sorted([(id, sym) for sym, id in v.items() if id < 256])
print(base_tokens[:20])
EOF
python3 /app/probe_vocab2.py

input.command: ls -la /app/gpt2.c
wc -c /app/gpt2.c

cat << 'EOF' > /app/minify.py
import re
with open("/app/gpt2.c", "r") as f:
    code = f.read()
# replace multiple spaces with single space
code = re.sub(r' +', ' ', code)
# remove spaces around operators
code = re.sub(r' ?([=+\-*/<>!&|{}();,\[\]]) ?', r'\1', code)
# fix includes
code = re.sub(r'#include<', '#include <', code)
with open("/app/gpt2_min.c", "w") as f:
    f.write(code)
EOF
python3 /app/minify.py
